About Us
WHERE THE J.B.N GAME PAYS BACK.
01
📍
Based in Bremen
Built in the heart of Northern Germany. Small city, world-class ambition.
02
🎮
Mobile First
We build for the phone in your pocket — fast, fun, and truly rewarding.
03
🚀
Just Getting Started
PYDIR is our first game — and the first of many. The dream is just beginning.
The Team Behind PYDIR
J.B.N UG — where gaming gets real.
We're a small, passionate team of developers with a big dream: to create games that feel rewarding in every sense of the word. PYDIR is our first release, and it's just the beginning. We believe gaming should be more than fun — it should be meaningful.
📍 Bremen, Germany 🎮 Mobile Gaming 🚀 Early Stage Studio
